title: Player Status
description: Display player status, how many points and badges the player earned. Also show the progress in levels and challenges.
html:
{{player.name}}
{{player.total_points}} {{i18n("points")}}
{{player.total_challenges}}
{{player.level.level}} {{player.level.position}}/{{player.level_progress.total_levels}}
{{player.level_progress.percent_completed | number : 0}}%

{{player.level_progress.next_points}} {{i18n("pts_next_level")}}

{{i18n("challenges_progress")}}

  • {{progress.percent_completed | number : 0}}%

{{i18n("earned_badges")}} {{player.total_challenges}}

  • {{total}}
